source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Constipation – 04
source.population: People presenting with constipation; no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth constipation documentation; partial for a setting-agnostic GP workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines DHA-licensed telehealth scope and emergency and controlled-medication exclusions.

added_items.rationale: Defines the exact Dubai telehealth scope and emergency exclusions.

added_items.final_wording: Specifies nature, onset, duration, bowel diary, secondary causes, straining, incomplete evacuation, abdominal pain, bleeding, and medication context.

added_items.final_wording: Lists new onset in older people, anaemia, rectal bleeding, family history, tenesmus, weight loss, and persistent unresponsive constipation.
